name: Andrea Cañás Garabito
title: Full Stack Developer
avatarLabel: Pixel art of a farm girl with long brown hair
about:
Hi! I am Andrea, a Higher Technician in Web Application Development currently working as a Full Stack Developer at DXC for the CaixaBank account.

I specialize in Java, REST services with Spring Boot, SOAP, Liferay DXP, and Struts, with experience across backend, frontend, and high-criticality environments.

I also contribute to functional analysis, business coordination, and mentoring junior profiles, combining technical delivery with a team-oriented mindset.

studies.degree: Higher Technician in Web Application Development

certificates.name: Software Architecture: Essential Software Systems Design

experience.title: Full Stack Developer
experience.summary: Developing at DXC Technology and contributing to banking transfer projects for CaixaBank. Previously, I spent two and a half years working in the Digital Marketing area.
responsibilities: Functional analysis and requirement definition with business stakeholders.
Direct client communication and team coordination.
Owner of gitflow and mentoring of junior profiles in the team.
Backend development with Java and frontend development with React in high-criticality environments.
Traceable functional and technical documentation and deployment monitoring in production environments.
experience.technologies: Java · Spring Framework · APIs REST · Microservices ·React.js · TypeScript · JavaScript · Oracle Database · Maven · Jenkins · Apache Tomcat · Oracle WebLogic · JUnit · jQuery · AJAX · GitLab · Rally Software · Confluence · Jest

experience.title: Full Stack Developer
experience.summary: Development and maintenance of corporate portals in Liferay DXP for clients such as the Government of Navarre, Iberdrola, and Allfunds Bank.
responsibilities: Portlet and application development in Liferay DXP.
Functional analysis, enhancements, and incident management in web portals.
Content management and support for service continuity.
experience.technologies: Java · Liferay DXP · Spring Framework · APIs REST · JavaScript · jQuery · JSTL · Bootstrap · JBoss · Apache Tomcat · Microsoft SQL Server · MySQL · Jira

experience.title: Junior Software Developer
experience.summary: Experience in e-government projects for Xunta de Galicia and the Provincial Council of A Coruna, combining development, support, and integration.
responsibilities: Development and maintenance of web applications with Java, Spring, Struts II, and Hibernate.
experience.technologies: Java · Apache Tomcat · Jenkins · JavaScript · Struts 2 · Spring Framework · Hibernate · PostgreSQL · Oracle · jQuery · AJAX · SASS · Bootstrap · SOAP · Liferay 7 · Git · Jira
